title: mentha aquatica f. riparia
intro: Mentha aquatica f. riparia, also known as river mint or riparian mint, is a subspecies of the water mint plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica f. riparia include its ability to alleviate headaches, ease respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Mentha aquatica f. riparia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits and support overall well-being.
